comment.body:
Good point and article says later this year. Matches strongly with Alma's overall outlook after-market ripping after any brief fall in the upcoming next 2 weeks. Practically speaking Trump 2.0 is same as Trump 1.0 and the guy telegraphs his moves clearly. His legacy and public image is tied to the stock market and he will use any tool in the book and even break some rules along the way to juice markets up :). Does not mean a temporary fall for couple of weeks won't happen. 

Two ways. One could either play the puts to catch the fall which is risky or wait for the fall and play the long side which is safer.

comment.body: @Nazir Also asking this more out of curiosity and to exchange thoughts since learning makes us better as traders. What are you seeing in the weekly since all I see is bullish formation. I do not see an intermediate top. All of the previous intermediate tops had 2 weeks red in a row and followed standard 3 candle patterns. This week is closing green and previous week red candle is sandiwched between 2 green candles. It does not become an abandoned baby or evening doji star. In fact would be a counter argument against fall next week and gives me pause on loading puts today.
